//: Type-checks the serverless functions in api/. Vercel compiles them with esbuild (no type-check), and the default `tsc -b` build only covers src/ + vite.config, so this config is run separately (npx tsc -p tsconfig.api.json) to catch API type errors. It mirrors the app's bundler resolution (so shared src/game modules that use Vite's import.meta.env and extensionless imports resolve) while adding Node types for the serverless runtime.
